description: Added Seerr local account sign-in, so users can authenticate with jellyfin or local Seerr credentials since Moonfin server plugin web UI is going away in the next update.

Fixed multiple subtitle download issues: Overhang is now hidden during subtitle search. Focus correctly returns to the Search button when subtitle search appears. Language names now display correctly in the radio dialog.
Fixed a type-mismatch issue by renaming wasClosed to whatsNewClosed that was causing the What's New dialog to not get dismissed properly for some users.
Updated navbar focus styling to a full-height white pill and cleaned up pill padding to match other clients.
rename wasClosed to whatsNewClosed to avoid type mismatch (PR #91)
author: @harleykradovill
